title: cypripedium guttatum var. yatabeanum
intro: Cypripedium guttatum var. yatabeanum is a variety of the yellow lady's slipper orchid, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues. The roots of the Cypripedium guttatum var. yatabeanum are rich in alkaloids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the roots are often dried and processed into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
